title: "Has Ardie Savea Saved Super Rugby"
summary: Matt Heath and Finn Caddie join ACC Head G Lane to discuss a MASSIVE weekend of sport (00:00) and who the hottest F1 driver is (04:10)...Then, they review Moana's epic win over the Blues and Ardie Savea saving Super Rugby (15:30), the Wahs winning five in a row, and Marky Mark Nawaqanitawase's INSANE try for the Roosters (25:00). Plus, Auckland FC are halfway to the A League Final, but someone needs to save Storm Purvis (27:45)Finally, they get to your feedback in 'Yours Please' (43:35)...Brought to you by Export Ultra! See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

title: "A Fox In The Quail House"
summary: James Lauderdale McOnie and Finn Caddie join ACC Head G Lane to discuss how hard the Panthers are coming in the Stanley Cup Playoffs (00:00)... Then, the fellas head to the 'Sports Rights Desk' to discuss the news of Wimbledon being screened on Disney+ this year (5:40) and Ryan Fox's dream start to the PGA Championship (11:10). Next, whether anyone cares about the America's Cup heading to Italy (16:10) and Baz getting his Sexy Camel back (20:40). Plus a preview of the Super Rugby weekend ahead (23:55)! Finally, they get to your feedback in 'Yours Please' (30:30)...Brought to you by Export Ultra! See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

title: "Live From The NZ Boat Show"
summary: On this special episode of The Agenda, Finn Caddie joins ACC Head G Lane live from the Hutchwilco New Zealand Boat Show (00:00)...The fellas all the sights and sounds and people watching at the Boat Show (0:45), and Team New Zealand's announcement of Pete Burling's replacement (9:45). Plus, Jonesy from NZ Fishing News magazine joins the podcast to chat all things Boat Show and play a game of 'Sex Toy or Fishing Lure' (14:30)...Brought to you by Export Ultra! See omnystudio.com/listener for privacy information.

title: "A Sh*tload Of Cocaine"
summary: WATCH THE FULL EPISODE ON OUR YOUTUBE CHANNEL HERE!Finn Caddie joins ACC Head G Lane to discuss exactly how much is a "sh*tload" of cocaine (00:00)...Then, they chat about all the hyphenated names in the Warriors team (6:25), Mike Hesson being named the Coach of the Pakistan white-ball cricket team (13:00) and the bizarre scenes in the NZ A and Bangladesh A matches (15:30)... Plus, Rieko Ioane expects a "50/50" reception from Leinster supporters (18:45), and former English rugby player Danny Care tells a great story about Jonah Lomu (21:00)!Finally, they get to your feedback in 'Yours Please' (28:28)...Brought to you by Export Ultra! title: "Rules For Viewing Blue"

title: "Everybody Hates G Lane"
summary: WATCH THE FULL EPISODE ON OUR YOUTUBE CHANNEL HERE!Finn Caddie joins ACC Head G Lane to discuss his run-ins with South African parents on the sidelines over the weekend (00:00) before Ryan Fox's first-ever PGA Tour win derails the podcast! Then, G Lane rubs all his Chiefs Mana in Finn's face after the big comeback win over the Crusaders on Saturday (05:00), before another Wahs win has the fellas once again asking... Is it our year (11:30)? Plus, Auckland FC now know who they will face in the playoffs (15:05) and did G Lane cancel the IPL (18:30)...Finally, they get to your feedback in 'Yours Please' (24:30)...Brought to you by Export Ultra! title: "Pope Lane"
summary: WATCH THE FULL EPISODE ON OUR YOUTUBE CHANNEL HERE!James Lauderdale McOnie & Finn Caddie join ACC Head G Lane to rejoice in the news that G Lane is not the newly elected Pope, and if the NRL Bunker should be renamed to The Conclave this weekend (00:00)... Then, the fellas preview another big weekend of Super Rugby, including what some are calling the Final between the Crusaders and the Chiefs (11:45), discuss the Highlanders getting $40K of gear stolen from a car in Auckland (21:20) and the British & Irish Lions have named their squad to tour Aussie featuring more Kiwis than Welsh (24:50)!  Finally, they get to your feedback in 'Yours Please' (29:05)...Brought to you by Export Ultra! title: "The Worst Take Of 2025"
